description: Designed DHS card in the 'LIVING OUR TRUTH' template: a pastel paper-texture background with a fan of diagonal rainbow stripes in the top-left corner overlaid with the white outlined headline 'LIVING OUR TRUTH,' and 'DHS celebrates' with multicolor 'LGBTQIA+ Pride' at top-right. Centered is a circular photo, framed by a rainbow-gradient ring, of a woman with dark hair pulled back, in a maroon top, in an indoor setting. Below a large blue quotation mark, the block quote reads: "I am blessed to be able to work and live in an environment that is accepting of me on a professional level and family level. Years ago, when I first came out, things were not how they are today. Now many of us are making strides to change laws in our workforce and provide training for offices on how to accept all LGBTQIA+ people and work together." Bottom-left has a small vertical rainbow bar and attribution: 'Angela M. / ICE, Financial Program Specialist / with DHS for 5 Years.' The rainbow-accented circular DHS seal is at bottom-right.
notable_text: LIVING OUR TRUTH; DHS celebrates LGBTQIA+ Pride; "I am blessed to be able to work and live in an environment that is accepting of me on a professional level and family level..."; Angela M., ICE, Financial Program Specialist, with DHS for 5 Years
